titleStmt.title: SII 39.77: original edition by K. Karuppiah

No. 77. (A.R. No. 77 of 1916.) TIRUKKĀḶAKKUḌI, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMNAD DISTRICT. KAKŌḶANĀTH TEMPLE-ON THE ROCK ADJOINING THE SAME TEMPLE MĀṞAVARMAN ALIAS TRIBHUVAṈACHAKRAVARTIN SUNDRAPĀṆḌYA DĒVA, ‘WHO PLEASED TO TAKE THE CHŌḺA COUNTRY’-5THYEAR AND 528TH DAY (1221 A.D.)

summary.p: This inscription refers to the gift of tax-free land for conducting the service called Muḍivaḻaṅguperumāḷsandi in the temple Śivadharmīśvaramuḍaiya-nāyaṉār at Tirukkōḷakkuḍi, by the king at the request of his brother-in-law (machchunanār) Aḻagapperumāḷ. The king, while issuing the order, was occupying the seat called Mālavarāyaṉ in the Palliyaraikkūḍam of his palace at Poṉṉamarāpadi in Puṟamalaināḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī pūmaruviya tirumaṭantaiyum (2 to 12 prasasthi)
komāṟapaṉmarāṉa tiripuvaṉa cakkaravattikaḷ coṇāṭu koṇṭaruḷiya śrī cuntarapāṇṭiya tevar yāṇṭu 5vatu nāḷ Aiññūṟṟirupatteṭṭiṉāl puṟamalai
nāṭṭup poṉṉamarāpatik koyilp paḷḷiyaṟaik kūṭattup paḷḷippiṭa maḻavārayaṉil Eḻuntaruḷiyiruntu Iṉṉāṭṭut tirukkoḷakku
ṭic civadharmmiśvamuṭaiyanāyaṉār koyilc civapbrahmaṇarum sthāṉapatikaḷuñ ceyyat tiruvāymoḻintaruḷiṉapaṭi Ittevarkku muṭivaḻaṅku
m perumāḷ cantikkum tiruvarddayāmattukkum tiruppaṭimāṟṟuḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭum nivantaṅkaḷukkun tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyākattu mānāṭṭu
muḷḷikkuṭiyil nāṭṭi Attūṉ kuḷamum naṭuvum Ivai ṉāṉkellaikkuṭpaṭṭa nilam Aincāvatiṉ Etirāmāṇṭu mutal kārāṇmai miyāṭciyum An
tarāyamum Uṭpaṭat tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāka Iṭappeṟa veṇumeṉṟu maccuṉaṉār Aḻakapperumāḷ namakkuc coṉṉamaiyil Ittevarkku muṭivaḻa
m perumāḷ cantikkum tiruviḷaiyāṭṭattukkum tiruppaṭimāṟṟuḷḷiṭṭu vēṇṭu nivantaṅkaḷukku Ivvūrkaḷ muḷḷikkuṭi nāṭṭiyattāṉ ku
ḷamum naṭuvum Ivai nāṉkellaikku Uṭpaṭṭa nilam Ivvāṇṭu mutal kārāṇmai miyāṭciyum Antarāyamum Uṭpaṭat tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāka Iṭ
ṭu variyilār Eḻuttiṭṭa Uḷvariyum nam Ōlaiyum taraccoṉṉom kaikkoṇṭu tiruppaṭimāṟṟuḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭum nivantaṅkaḷ cellappaṇ
ṇuka veṉṟum Ippaṭi cantirātittavaṟ celvatāka kalliluñ cempilum veṭṭivittuk koḷkaveṉṟu tiruvāymoḻintaruḷiṉār
Digital edition of SII 39.77 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
